name: Refried Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet until it is crispy and remove from heat.
2. Add the garlic and onion to the skillet. Fry the onions until they are clear.
3. Add the beans to the skillet. Mash the beans with a potato masher until they are lumpy while they continue heating.
This recipe was sent by "H. WHITED ENGRAVING"  on Mar 16, 1998, and converted by MCBuster.
